01. About

Who I Am

I'm Monishma M, a pre-final year B.Tech student in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at PSNA College of Engineering and Technology, Dindigul, with a CGPA of 9.19. I have been recognized with the Academic Excellence Award for four consecutive semesters.

My GitHub reflects my passion for building real-world AI solutions through projects in computer vision, IoT-integrated AI, deep learning deployment, and multilingual NLP. From drowsiness and emotion detection systems to AI-powered LPG monitoring and Flask-based EV classification, each project focuses on solving practical problems end-to-end.

In February 2026, I presented my AI-IoT LPG Monitoring research at IEEE ICEARS 2026, an international peer-reviewed conference, where the paper received publication acceptance.

Interested in building scalable AI-powered applications and deployment-ready systems. I am currently seeking internship opportunities to apply my AI and software development skills in real-world industry environments and contribute to impactful, scalable solutions.

03. Projects

What I've Built

01 — IoT + AIIEEE PUBLISHED
Gas Sentinel — LPG Monitoring System

AI + IoT system for LPG leakage detection, weight monitoring, theft prevention, and real-time mobile alerts — all surfaced on a live Flutter dashboard.

Presented & accepted at IEEE ICEARS 2026 — international peer-reviewed publication
PythonIoT Sensors FlutterReal-time DashboardAI Alerts
GitHub View Deployment
02 — Computer Vision
Real-Time Sleep & Drowsiness Detection

MobileNetV2 + OpenCV pipeline classifying eye state (awake/sleepy) from a live webcam feed with color-coded bounding boxes and sub-second alert latency.

Kaggle MRL Eye Dataset · Binary crossentropy + Adam optimizer
PythonTensorFlow/Keras OpenCVMobileNetV2Haar Cascade
GitHub Live Demo
03 — Computer Vision
Live Facial Emotion Detection

Custom CNN trained on 48×48 grayscale face images classifying 7 emotions in real time from a webcam feed — full train, evaluate, and live-deploy pipeline.

TensorFlow 2.20 + ImageDataGenerator · Separate evaluation script
PythonTensorFlow 2.20 OpenCVCNNMatplotlib
GitHub Live Demo
04 — ML Deployment · Flask
Electric Vehicle Image Classifier

End-to-end CNN pipeline for EV type classification — trained, saved as .h5, and deployed via Flask web app with real-time browser-based prediction.

Full ML lifecycle: training → evaluation → Flask deployment
PythonTensorFlow/Keras FlaskOpenCVHTML/CSS
GitHub View Deployment
05 — NLP · Multilingual AILangAThon 2025
Capto — Multilingual Image Captioning

AI captioning system generating image descriptions in regional Indian languages with integrated text-to-speech — deployed live on Hugging Face Spaces, making AI accessible to 500M+ speakers.

Live on Hugging Face · Won LangAThon 2025 Prototype Display Phase
PythonNLP TensorFlowHugging FaceTTS
Try Live Demo
06 — NLP · Healthcare
AI Voice-to-Text Prescription Generator

Speech recognition + NLP pipeline converting doctor dictation into structured prescriptions in real time — reducing clinical transcription errors. Built at V-MEDITHON 2024.

Reduces clinical transcription errors · CYSCOM & NEXUS hackathon
PythonNLP Speech RecognitionMedical AI

V-MEDITHON 2024 — Healthcare AI Hackathon

Sep 2024
IEEE Publication
IEEE ICEARS 2026 · International Conference on Electrical, Electronics and Allied Sciences
AI-Enabled LPG Monitoring: Weight Tracking, Leakage Detection & Theft Prevention

A novel IoT-AI integrated system combining smart weight sensors, ML-based anomaly detection, and a real-time mobile dashboard to address household LPG safety. The paper details the hardware architecture, model pipeline, alert mechanism, and field validation results. Accepted for IEEE proceedings, February 2026.
